executiveSummary.primaryIssue: Master Admin was sent to onboarding instead of platform Admin Dashboard due to race between auth, role resolution, and membership check.
rootCauses: ProtectedRoute membership query ran before async Master Admin check settled
No synchronous 'never onboarding' check for Master Admin email
AuthPage already-logged-in redirect waited for async role
user_roles query only checked super_admin, not master_admin
Onboarding existingOrg query ran for Master Admin
Register always sent to onboarding; no /admin/dashboard route
architectureGapsAddressed: Centralized Master Admin in @/lib/auth-constants.ts with optional VITE_MASTER_ADMIN_EMAIL
DB: master_admin in app_role; is_platform_admin() for RLS
highestPriorityFixesApplied: ProtectedRoute: sync isMasterAdminByEmail first; membership enabled includes !isMasterAdminByEmail
AuthPage: redirect to /admin/dashboard; sync isMasterAdminByEmail for already-logged-in; check user_roles for super_admin and master_admin
Onboarding: redirect to /admin/dashboard; existingOrg enabled includes !isMasterAdminByEmail

filesModified.issue: Redirect target; already-logged-in delay; role check
filesModified.fix: ADMIN_DASHBOARD_PATH; sync isMasterAdminByEmail; user_roles super_admin + master_admin

filesModified.issue: Master Admin could see onboarding; query ran for admin

filesModified.fix: Add master_admin; is_platform_admin(); RLS user_roles and organizations

changes: Add master_admin to app_role (DO block idempotent)
Replace RLS 'Admins can manage roles' (user_roles) with is_platform_admin(auth.uid())
Replace RLS 'Admins can manage orgs' (organizations) with is_platform_admin(auth.uid())
database.optionalSeed: INSERT INTO public.user_roles (user_id, role) VALUES ('<auth.users.id>', 'master_admin') ON CONFLICT (user_id, role) DO NOTHING;

optional.description: Override default Master Admin email (default: zainbooksys@gmail.com)

deployChecklist: Clone repo and run npm install
Copy .env.example to .env and set VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY (and optionally VITE_MASTER_ADMIN_EMAIL)
Run npm run build; fix any errors
Apply migration 20260315000000_add_master_admin_role.sql (e.g. supabase db push or Supabase SQL editor)
Optional: Seed Master Admin in user_roles
Deploy dist/ or connect host with env vars set

postDeployVerification.description: Master Admin sign-in lands on /admin/dashboard (not onboarding)
Visiting /onboarding as Master Admin redirects to /admin/dashboard
New tenant signup can complete onboarding and reach dashboard
Unauthenticated user on protected route redirects to /auth
npm run build succeeds with production env vars

e2eScenarios.name: Master Admin login
e2eScenarios.steps: Sign in with Master Admin email

e2eScenarios.name: Direct /onboarding as Master Admin
e2eScenarios.steps: Open /onboarding while logged in as Master Admin

e2eScenarios.name: Direct /dashboard as Master Admin
e2eScenarios.steps: Open /dashboard while logged in as Master Admin

e2eScenarios.name: Register as Master Admin
e2eScenarios.steps: Sign up with Master Admin email (instant session)

deliverables.code: Auth constants, ProtectedRoute, AuthPage, Onboarding, Register, Dashboard, App route, Attendance, index.css
deliverables.config: .env.example; no placeholders in critical auth logic
